\section*{Per-peptide CG--MD evidence tables}

The operational binary criterion was $\mathrm{AP\_SASA}_{200\,\mathrm{ns}}\geq 1.75$ and $\mathrm{AP\ contact}_{190-200\,\mathrm{ns}}\geq 0.5$. Largest-cluster fraction, singleton fraction, cluster count, mean contacts, and visual inspection were supporting evidence and did not enter the binary operational conjunction. Phase 4-D candidates were not simulated and are not included as CG--MD result rows.
